TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Takofan, title = Takofan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Takofan} }

S.FORM: alang Takofan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 359 buwan, 1,048 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 55% kyan ku 578 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 45% kyan ku 470 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 52%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Takofan hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Takofan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Takofan hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Takofan hya' ga Chishang. tay mkyahu' na Takofan hya' ga Parupu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Takofan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ku'ang sang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 359 buwan, 1,048 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 55% kyan ku 578 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 45% kyan ku 470 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 52%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Takofan hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Takofan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Takofan hya' ga Kano go. tay mkraya' na Takofan hya' ga Chishang. tay mkyahu' na Takofan hya' ga Parupu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕ‹ tako*an ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku tajto keЕ‹ atu kuК”aЕ‹ s~Й•aЕ‹ ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa *** ОІuwan, *,*** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕ‹an ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕ‹ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenК¦~КЁumin ЙЈa, amis~Й• **%, s~Й•ajs~Й•ijat *%, ОІinaД§ liД§ujan s~Й•К”uli *%. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj К”llaw na tako*an Д§jaК” ЙЈa ws~Й•iluЕ‹ kraД§uК”. taj К”zil na tako*an Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax kraД§uК”. taj mkjaД§uК” na tako*an Д§jaК” ЙЈa kano ЙЈo. taj mkrajaК” na tako*an Д§jaК” ЙЈa К¦~КЁД§is~Й•Д§aЕ‹. taj mkjaД§uК” na tako*an Д§jaК” ЙЈa parupu. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj maki * pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” К¦~КЁikuj. tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕ‹an na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
